title: Lesliegraecum chamaeanthus
taxonomy: Lesiegraecum chamaeanthus is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae. It is native to Greece and other parts of the Mediterranean region. The plant is a type of succulent and is known for its unique, fleshy leaves. Further classification of the plant would be at the genus and species levels, with the full binomial nomenclature being Lesliegraecum chamaeanthus. This classification can be further broken down into more specific categories such as family, order, class, and kingdom.
